arts.ttl: Aston Villa's next five fixtures compared to Newcastle and Chelsea and Premier League rivals
arts.sum: Aston Villa's next five fixtures compared to Newcastle and Chelsea and Premier League rivals Aston Villa are fighting for a top five finish to guarantee a second season on Champions League football - but it's a congested race

arts.ttl: Good news as Aston Villa have ‘ruled out serious problem’ for star – Big sigh of relief for all
arts.sum: Aston Vill have ‘assured’ Argentina that Emiliano Martinez will not be absent in the next international break after leaving the loss to Crystal Palace at half-time. That’s according to Rio Negro, who cover the goalkeeper today after he set alarm bells ringing in his national team. arts.ttl: ‘A long, hard game’ – Aston Villa vs Cardiff City prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Aston Villa vs Cardiff City prediction ahead of the FA Cup clash on Friday. The post ‘A long, hard game’ – Aston Villa vs Cardiff City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

Aston Villa come into Friday's FA Cup welcome of Cardiff on the back of a demoralising 4-1 loss at Crystal Palace in midweek. Unai Emery tinkered with his tactics for that defeat, using a three-man ba...

arts.ttl: Emi Martinez return hope revealed after Aston Villa injury
arts.sum: Cardiff forward Isaak Davies said it would be "unbelievable" to score past World Cup-winning goalkeeper Emiliano Martinez, with the Bluebirds plotting a huge FA Cup upset against Aston Villa . Recalling his Anfield experience where he set up Rubin Colwill's consolation, Davies said: "When I came on as a sub that game, I felt I was playing in FIFA and I think Villa Park will be the same.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Marcus Rashford transfer ruled out as Erik ten Hag makes honest admission
arts.sum: As Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim prepares for Sunday's FA Cup match against Fulham, his predecessor Erik ten Hag has been speaking about his own time in charge

arts.ttl: Aston Villa barge Chelsea and Man Utd aside in race for Duran replacement
arts.sum: Aston Villa barge Chelsea and Man Utd aside in race for Duran replacement Aston Villa are'stepping up' their pursuit of Samu Aghehowa, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Report: Agent pushing Aston Villa striker to play in Serie A next season
arts.sum: On the final day of the winter transfer window, Aston Villa secured a surprise loan deal for Marco Asensio, bringing him in from Paris Saint-Germain for the remainder of the season. Since arriving in the Premier League, the Spanish playmaker has made an instant impact. arts.ttl: 'Memories to be made' for Cardiff against Aston Villa
arts.sum: Cardiff City forward Isaak Davies says "there are memories to be made" for the players and fans as they prepare to take on Aston Villa in the FA Cup fifth round.
